summary: Backend fix verified: national-type private league (Desylega) home & standings now correct. last_5_performance=[] when user has no predictions (no historical matchday leak). Standings shows 0 pts/matchdays for user without predictions. Regression confirmed: ilio's manual league data unchanged (last_5: [{md:1,pts:0},{md:2,pts:0},{md:3,pts:4},{md:4,pts:2}], total=6.0).
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: server.py lines 929-935 - for national-type leagues, last_5_performance skips matchdays where user has no predictions (has_predictions == 0 → continue). This prevents historical national matchdays from leaking into private league home view.

VERIFIED: server.py lines 1973-1985 - get_total_standings uses national matchday IDs (not league_id filter) for national-type leagues, correctly aggregating score_summaries that were created without league_id by admin_confirm_matchday.
VERIFIED: Desy (national-type, no predictions) → last_5_performance=[], total_points=0, matchdays_played=0 in standings.
VERIFIED: ilio (manual league) → last_5=[{md:1,0},{md:2,0},{md:3,4},{md:4,2}], total=6.0 points in standings. No regression.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix for national-type private league home/standings fully verified. Key fix: (1) GET /api/home last_5_performance for national-type leagues now skips matchdays where user has no predictions (prevents historical national matchday leak). (2) GET /api/standings/total for national-type leagues queries score_summaries by national matchday IDs (not league_id, since admin_confirm_matchday creates summaries without league_id). Both Desylega (national-type, no predictions) and ilio's manual league (4 matchdays, 6.0 pts) are correct. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_national_league_home_standings.py

rca_of_the_issue.bug: National-type private leagues (like Desylega) showed wrong data: last_5_performance showed historical national matchdays the user never played, and total standings showed 0 pts/giornate for everyone.
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: admin_confirm_matchday creates score_summaries WITHOUT league_id. The old queries used league_id filter (e.g., {user_id, matchday_id, league_id: desylega_id}) which found no docs since summaries have no league_id. This caused: (a) last_5 to fall back to reading ALL national completed matchdays regardless of user participation; (b) standings to show 0 pts for everyone.
rca_of_the_issue.fix: (a) last_5: for national-type leagues, check if user has predictions for each completed matchday; skip if 0. (b) standings: for national-type leagues, query score_summaries by matchday_id IN [national_md_ids] WITHOUT league_id filter.
rca_of_the_issue.reproduction: 1. Create national-type private league (desiree@raimondi.it/Desylega). 2. GET /api/home?league_id=788c822f-... → before fix: last_5 showed historical national matchdays. After fix: last_5=[].
